concerns.text: Task T023 restricts VIF calculation to 'Linear Regression baseline ONLY'. This violates FR-009 which mandates: 'System MUST compute variance inflation factors (VIF) for each descriptor within the full multiple regression model'. The task silently narrows the scope of the requirement, excluding the primary tree-based models (RF/GB) from the collinearity diagnostics mandated by the spec.

Task T024 (Permutation Testing) and T026 (Bootstrap) implement a 'skip' logic if N < 50, writing a placeholder. FR-006 and FR-011 mandate the system 'MUST calculate' and 'MUST perform' these tests. The task introduces a silent relaxation where the mandatory statistical validation is bypassed entirely under low-data conditions, violating the 'MUST' constraint of the FRs.

Task T008 enforces a strict 'halt on missing verified URL' policy. While aligned with the Plan, this contradicts FR-001 which requires the system to 'download... from at least one open repository... and report the count... if count < 500, the system MUST flag a data limitation'. The task prevents the system from ever reaching the 'flag a data limitation' state by terminating before data acquisition if the specific 'verified' URL is missing, effectively weakening the FR's fallback reporting requirement.
